message:
feat: add Social column to leaderboard + fix plural labels (#1371)

- Add Social column showing affiliate link click counts for interns
  (fetched from console.kubestellar.io/api/affiliate/clicks)
- Fix plural labels: '1 PRs' → '1 PR', '1 Bugs' → '1 Bug', etc.
- Rename 'Issues' pill to 'Others' to avoid confusion with 'Bugs'
  (Bugs = issues labeled kind/bug, Others = issues without bug/feature label)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
